audit_items.proof_trace: lzf_d.c contains exactly one function, lzf_decompress, and has zero free() calls and zero heap allocations; all pointer variables (ip, op, ref, in_end, out_end) are stack-local and derived from caller-provided buffers. The assertion forall free(p) in lzf_d.c is a universal quantification over the empty set, which is vacuously true. No UAF or double-free is possible in this file.
